attributes.Update Strategy Expression:
IIF(UPDATE_FLG = 'I' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'B' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'S', DD_INSERT,
IIF(UPDATE_FLG = 'D' OR UPDATE_FLG = 'U', DD_UPDATE, DD_REJECT))

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT    FS.ecosys_timephased_budgetid,
    FS.project_number,
    FS.project_period,
    FS.workflow_instance_id,
    FS.budget_header_id,
    FS.change_header_id,
    FS.cost_account_field,
    FS.path_id,
    FS.minor_period,
    FS.jacobs_cost,
    FS.client_cost,
    FS.jacobs_hours,
    FS.client_hours,
    FS.currency,
    FS.aux1_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux2_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux3_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux4_changed_on_dt,
    FS.datasource_num_id,
    FS.integration_id,
    FS.tenant_id,
	NVL(PROJ_D.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0),
/*case when TO_number(substr(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,-2)) > 21 then 101220211001000 
when UPPER(FS.minor_period) in ('OCT-21','NOV-21','DEC-21') then 101220211001000 
else nvl(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0) end ,  */
NVL(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(ORG_DH.ROW_WID,0),
MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT,
NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(COBS.ROW_WID,0),
FS.GID_EAC_HOURS,
NVL(REPLACE(FS.GDCName, ' ', 'Undefined'), 'Undefined') GDCName,
FS.GID_CB_FUNC_DIRECTCOST,
FS.GID_CB_FUNC_ATBILLREVENUE
FROM
    wc_bi_timephasedata_budget_fs FS,
	W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MCAL_D,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MINOR_MCAL_D,
WC_BU_ORG_DH ORG_DH,
(
select max(NVL(W_TASK_D.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
FROM W_TASK_D,
WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_COBS_D COBS,
W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D WHERE 
COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER  
AND COBS.ORACLE_TASK_NUMBER = W_TASK_D.TASK_NUMBER
AND PROJ_D.INTEGRATION_ID = W_TASK_D.PROJECT_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
group by COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID)COBS,
(
select max(NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID
from WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_BDG_HDR_D BUD_WID 
group by BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID)BUD_WID
--,WC_BI_COMPLIANCE_COMPLIANT_A COMP_AGG
WHERE 
FS.PROJECT_NUMBER  = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.PROJECT_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')
AND MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')  
AND MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND PROJ_D.X_CONTROL_PU = ORG_DH.INTEGRATION_ID  (+)
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ORG_DH.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID (+)
AND (NVL(FS.CHANGE_HEADER_ID,FS.BUDGET_HEADER_ID) = (substr(BUD_WID.PROJECt_NUMBER(+),1,6)||'.'||BUD_WID.TASK_ID(+))  )
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER  (+)
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID  (+)
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND FS.PATH_ID = COBS.PATH_ID (+) 
AND FS.PROJECT_PERIOD = COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD (+) 
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+)
--AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COMP_AGG.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
--AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = COMP_AGG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--and FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COMP_AGG.PROJECT_NUMBER

AND COBS.ORACLE_TASK_NUMBER = W_TASK_D.TASK_NUMBER
AND PROJ_D.INTEGRATION_ID = W_TASK_D.PROJECT_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
group by COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID)COBS,
(
select max(NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID
from WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_BDG_HDR_D BUD_WID 
group by BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID)BUD_WID
--,WC_BI_COMPLIANCE_COMPLIANT_A COMP_AGG
WHERE 
FS.PROJECT_NUMBER  = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.PROJECT_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')
AND MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')  
AND MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND PROJ_D.X_CONTROL_PU = ORG_DH.INTEGRATION_ID  (+)
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ORG_DH.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID (+)
AND (NVL(FS.CHANGE_HEADER_ID,FS.BUDGET_HEADER_ID) = (substr(BUD_WID.PROJECt_NUMBER(+),1,6)||'.'||BUD_WID.TASK_ID(+))  )
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER  (+)
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID  (+)
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND FS.PATH_ID = COBS.PATH_ID (+) 
AND FS.PROJECT_PERIOD = COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD (+) 
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+)
--AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COMP_AGG.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
--AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = COMP_AGG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--and FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COMP_AGG.PROJECT_NUMBER
